briefdescription.para: true=rendered Preview, false=raw Text for HTML/Markdown.
true when current file is HTML or Markdown.
true when the selected file is .svg (preview vs source).
true=raster preview, false=XML source in text view (persisted).
True while destroying; suppresses late PDF UI updates.
Constructs the main window and wires models, views, menus, and actions.

parameterdescription.para: Optional parent widget; typically nullptr for a top-level window.

briefdescription.para: Destroys the window and blocks disconnects PDF signals before child teardown.
Sets the file system model root to an existing directory.

parameterdescription.para: Absolute directory path; if invalid, shows a warning and returns.

briefdescription.para: Selects a file or folder in the tree and previews it when under the current root.

parameterdescription.para: Absolute path to a file or directory visible from the root.

briefdescription.para: Handles resize events on the image preview viewport to rescale the pixmap.

parameterdescription.para: Object receiving the event (image scroll viewport).
Qt event; QEvent::Resize triggers image scale refresh.

simplesect.para: true if the event was handled here; otherwise base-class result.

briefdescription.para: Previews the path for the newly selected tree item.

parameterdescription.para: New selection index; invalid shows an empty-state placeholder.
Prior selection (unused).

briefdescription.para: Shows a context menu for Open in skrat / default app / Open With.

parameterdescription.para: Viewport-local position for menu placement.

briefdescription.para: Prompts for a folder and calls setRootFolder() when accepted.
Zooms in the active PDF or image preview by a fixed factor.
Zooms out the active PDF or image preview by a fixed factor.
Sets PDF view zoom mode to fit-to-width when a PDF is active.
Resets PDF zoom to fit width or image zoom to fit the viewport.
Jumps the PDF view to the first page when a document is loaded.
Jumps the PDF view to the previous page if one exists.
Jumps the PDF view to the next page if one exists.
Jumps the PDF view to the last page when a document is loaded.
Shows the find toolbar and focuses the search field for PDF, text, or rich preview.
Selects the next row in the PDF search model and scrolls to that match.
Selects the previous row in the PDF search model and scrolls to that match.
Updates QPdfSearchModel::setSearchString and refreshes find UI state.

parameterdescription.para: New query string (may be empty to clear matches).

briefdescription.para: Updates match counts, labels, and action enablement after search model changes.
Runs the print-options dialog then raster or native-vector print pipeline.
Copies from the focused text/PDF widget and strips background HTML from clipboard.
Shows the About box with version, license, and project links.
Shows an in-window help browser with shortcuts and usage summary.
Writes a small launcher script to the user’s CLI path and explains PATH setup.
Opens the theme and UI font preferences dialog.
Parses the toolbar page field and jumps the PDF to that 1-based page.
Navigates the PDF view to the bookmark’s page, location, and zoom.

parameterdescription.para: Activated item in the TOC tree backed by QPdfBookmarkModel.

briefdescription.para: Expands TOC rows and refreshes TOC/thumbnail tab enablement after bookmark changes.
Jumps the PDF to the page encoded on the clicked thumbnail item.

parameterdescription.para: Thumbnail list item whose UserRole holds the 0-based page index.

briefdescription.para: Prompts for a PDF page or plain-text line depending on the active preview mode.
Refreshes page label, toolbar state, find bar visibility, and TOC/thumbnail tabs.
Starts a short debounce timer after QFileSystemWatcher reports a file change.

parameterdescription.para: Path that changed (unused; reload uses the tracked preview path).

briefdescription.para: Reloads the preview path after debounce, or shows unavailable if the file vanished.
Switches between source text and rendered preview for HTML/Markdown files.
Switches between raster SVG preview and XML source for .svg files.
Handles clicked links inside the rendered rich-text preview.

parameterdescription.para: Link target from QTextBrowser::anchorClicked.

briefdescription.para: Builds menus, toolbars, splitters, preview stack, and signal connections.
Loads and displays PDF, HTML/Markdown preview or source text, image, or placeholder content for absolutePath.

parameterdescription.para: Absolute filesystem path to preview.

briefdescription.para: Shows the stacked placeholder page with rich HTML and clears file watching.

parameterdescription.para: Rich text / HTML body for the placeholder QLabel.

briefdescription.para: Opens absolutePath with QDesktopServices (OS default application).

parameterdescription.para: Absolute path to a file or folder.

simplesect.para: true if the URL open request succeeded.

briefdescription.para: Launches appPath with absolutePath as its argument (platform-specific).

parameterdescription.para: File to open.
Executable or macOS .app bundle path.

briefdescription.para: Presents ranked “Open With” choices and records usage for future ranking.

parameterdescription.para: File to open with a chosen handler.

briefdescription.para: Returns a stable QSettings subgroup key for a file type (usually lower-case suffix).

parameterdescription.para: Path whose extension (or __noext__) defines the key.

simplesect.para: Non-empty type key used under Open With settings.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QString &fileTypeKey, const QString &appKey, const QString &label, const QString &appPath)
memberdef.name: recordOpenWithUsage

briefdescription.para: Increments launch counters and timestamps for Open With ranking.

parameterdescription.para: Result of fileTypeKeyForPath().
Stable identifier for the chosen application.
Human-readable label stored for menus.
Executable path stored for relaunch.

briefdescription.para: Returns the platform-specific path where the CLI launcher script is installed.

simplesect.para: Native path to skrat or skrat.cmd under the user’s local bin directory.

briefdescription.para: Returns the shell or batch script body that forwards arguments to this binary.

simplesect.para: UTF-8 script contents appropriate for the host OS.

briefdescription.para: Clears all paths from QFileSystemWatcher without changing the logical preview path.
Registers absoluteFilePath with QFileSystemWatcher for live reload.

parameterdescription.para: File to watch, or empty to clear watching only.

briefdescription.para: Shows a placeholder explaining the preview file disappeared (rename/delete).

parameterdescription.para: Absolute path that is no longer available on disk.

briefdescription.para: Enables “Go to page/line” when PDF or non-empty text preview is active.
Enables find/copy/print actions according to stack mode and model state.
Updates the “Match X of Y” (or similar) label next to the find field.
Returns the number of rows in the active QPdfSearchModel.

simplesect.para: Match count, or 0 if no model or empty query.

briefdescription.para: Selects search result index, jumps the PDF view, and syncs highlight state.

parameterdescription.para: 0-based row in QPdfSearchModel (must be in range).

briefdescription.para: Returns the current match index from the view or compatibility cache.
Sets the active search-result index on the view and mirrored member state.

parameterdescription.para: New current index, or -1 to clear selection.

briefdescription.para: Shows or hides TOC/thumbnail tabs and rebuilds thumbnails when page count changes.
Regenerates QListWidget thumbnail icons for every PDF page.
Selects the thumbnail row matching PdfGraphicsView::currentPage().
Rescales the image QLabel from m_imageOriginalPixmap and m_imageZoomFactor.
Updates visibility and checked state of the Preview/Text mode controls.

parameterdescription.para: true when current file supports dual rich preview modes.

briefdescription.para: Shows the correct Preview/Text vs SVG toolbar actions for the active file type.
true when the preview stack shows PDF, plain text, or rendered HTML (find applies).
Recomputes plain-text/rich HTML match ranges for the find field query.
Selects the index -th match in the text or rich preview document.
Heuristically classifies a path as plain text preview by extension.

parameterdescription.para: File metadata for the candidate path.

simplesect.para: true if the suffix is in the allowlisted text extensions.

briefdescription.para: Heuristically classifies a path as image preview by suffix or QImageReader.

parameterdescription.para: File metadata for the candidate path.

simplesect.para: true if the file is likely displayable as a raster or vector image.
